# Birkenhead

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Collapsible Soil Evaluation](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/collapsible-soil-evaluation/)
- [Cone Penetration](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/cone-penetration/)
- [Diaphragm Wall Design](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/diaphragm-wall-design/)
- [Differential Settlement Analysis](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/differential-settlement-analysis/)
- [Foundations](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/foundations/)
- [Geophysics](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/geophysics/)
- [Geotechnical Design Deep Excavations](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/geotechnical-design-deep-excavations/)
- [Geotechnical Road Drainage](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/geotechnical-road-drainage/)
- [Ground Improvement](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/ground-improvement/)
- [Grouting Design](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/grouting-design/)

- [Oedometer Consolidation](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/oedometer-consolidation/)

- [Rigid Pavement Design](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/rigid-pavement-design/)

- [Sheet Pile Wall Design](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/sheet-pile-wall-design/)

- [Slopes Walls](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/slopes-walls/)

- [Soil Mechanics Study](https://birkenhead.geotechnical-engineering.biz/soil-mechanics-study/)

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
